---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for MagStacker
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or awkward today? (e.g. "I
can't tell at a glance which mags haven't been used recently.")

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you've tried or thought about.

## Who is this for?

- [ ] Individual owner
- [ ] Club (shared inventory)
- [ ] Range (fleet/staff hardware)
- [ ] Other:

## Additional context

Mockups, related issues, or examples from other tools are welcome.
